Ford UK Chair Calls For 'Substantial' Incentives To Boost EV Demand: 'We Need And Want To Sell Electric Vehicles'
data.description: Ford Motor's UK chair Lisa Brankin has reportedly called on the government to provide consumer incentives of up to 5000 pounds per car to boost electric vehicle demand.

data.title: South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol Faces Impeachment Demands After Brief Martial Law, Opposition Calls It a 'Grave Act of Rebellion'
data.description: South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol faces calls for resignation or impeachment after a brief martial law caused political turmoil and market declines.
